name: Nightmare

spell.name: Nightmare
spell.deity: Alazhra, Corosbel, Cthulhu, Lamashtu, Nyarlathotep (Haunter in the Dark)
spell.critical_success: The target is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 1 week.
spell.success: The target has the nightmares but has no adverse effects other than unpleasant memories.
spell.failure: The target has the nightmares and awakens fatigued.
spell.critical_failure: The target has the nightmares, awakens fatigued, and is drained 2 until it is no longer fatigued.

text: You send disturbing nightmares to your target. The next time the target falls asleep, it must attempt a Will save. If you know the target only by name and have never met them, the target gets a +4 circumstance bonus to the Will save.
